description: CVSpec — the full optimized CV plus metadata returned by Gemini Flash

language_detected.description: ISO 639-1 language code of the job description

ats_score.description: ATS keyword match score for the optimized CV against this JD, 0-100

name.description: Candidate full name, unchanged from CV

title.description: Professional headline in the JD language, tailored to this role

linkedin.description: LinkedIn profile URL if present in the CV, empty string otherwise

github.description: GitHub profile URL if present in the CV, empty string otherwise

summary.description: 2-3 sentence ATS-optimized professional summary in the JD language. Must answer why this candidate fits this specific role.

summary_kpis.description: One-line key metrics from the CV only (e.g. 12+ yrs PM | 50M EUR ARR shipped | Bilingual FR/EN). No invented numbers.

experience.description: Work experience entries in reverse-chronological order. Each entry is one role.

role.description: Job title exactly as it appears in the CV — do not change

company_line.description: Company name, location, and date range (e.g. Wiser Solutions — Paris, France — Nov 2022 to present)

bullets.description: Impact-first bullet points for this role, 3-6 entries. Each starts with a past-tense action verb. Include verbatim JD keywords where natural.

is_oneliner.description: Set true for very early-career or short roles that should be collapsed to a single line to save space

skills.description: Skill categories in priority order — most JD-relevant first

category.description: Skill category label (e.g. Product, Languages, Tooling, Data, Leadership)

value.description: Comma-separated list of skills in this category

institution_line.description: Institution name, location, and year (e.g. HEC Paris — Paris — 2010)

languages.description: Language proficiencies (e.g. English: Bilingual, French: Native)

certifications.description: Professional certifications. Empty array if none.

projects.description: Notable projects or side work. Empty array if none or if dropped for space.

recommendations.description: 5-10 short advisory items the candidate should consider but were NOT auto-applied. Each is one actionable sentence.
